breadcrumb: Test Realm > Test Region > Test Site > Test Area > Area Import Test

purpose: Verify area JSON import creates a journal page with ProseMirror-friendly lists.
Confirm preparation, area, encounter, and conversation blocks render.
actors: Goblin - Hides behind crates and throws rocks when approached.
Phil the Terrible - A named goblin ringleader; barks orders from the back.
Bob the Barber - Townsfolk hiding in the corner; knows who tipped off the raiders.
gmnotes: Alarm bell rings if the strongbox is opened without disarming the wire.

narrative.description: A cramped storeroom stacked with barrels and cobwebs.
narrative.layout: Narrow aisles between barrel stacks; one clear path to the back wall.
narrative.atmosphere: Dusty, dim, and faintly sour from old ale.

narrativecard.title: Storeroom Entrance
narrativecard.description: Barrels loom in the gloom; something skitters behind the stacks.

interactivedetails: Trap - Tripwire on the third aisle from the left
Object - Locked strongbox against the back wall
discoverablefacts: Scratches on the floor show something heavy was dragged toward the cellar door.

encounter.overview: Goblins harass from cover until reduced to half, then flee through the cellar hatch.
tactics: Focus fire on the nearest PC
triggers: Opening the strongbox without disarming the wire
specialconditions: Cellar hatch is difficult terrain until cleared

conversations.name: Mira Vex

narrativecard.title: Mira Vex
narrativecard.description: A nervous clerk peeks out from behind a barrel.

theyknow: The goblins came through the cellar hatch an hour ago
theyveheard: Rumors of missing shipments from the dock ward
theywant: Someone to clear the storeroom so she can finish inventory
